compiled_state.title: Execute spike: verify OAuth endpoint, credential paths, and Python flock behavior
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Execute the 3 spike verifications and document findings:

1. **OAuth endpoint verification**: curl https://api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/usage with a test token (if available) or document the expected response schema from the examples/check-session-usage.sh reference. Document: response fields, rate-limit behavior, 429 conditions.

2. **Credential path verification**: Check ~/.claude/.credentials.json exists (Linux path) and document the JSON structure. On macOS, verify security CLI retrieval. Document: key path (claudeAiOauth.accessToken), file format, platform differences.

3. **Python flock verification**: Write a minimal Python script that opens a lockfile, acquires fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX), holds for 2 seconds, and releases. Run two instances concurrently and verify the second blocks until the first releases. Document: behavior under contention, error conditions.

Record all findings as a ticket comment on the parent story for downstream stories to reference.

## File Impact
- (no source files created — spike is verification-only)
- Findings recorded as ticket comment

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Spike findings documented as comment on story 3b89-0ec6
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 3b89-0ec6 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert any('spike' in c.get('body','').lower() or 'verification' in c.get('body','').lower() for c in d.get('comments',[]))"
- [ ] All 3 verifications have pass/fail status documented
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 3b89-0ec6 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); body=''.join(c.get('body','') for c in d.get('comments',[])); assert 'pass' in body.lower() or 'fail' in body.lower()"
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
